The '''Khonin Mountain Range''' was on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], east of [[the Cage]]. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] may have lived in a cave there.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|20|Luke Skywalker: Detective}}
